notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Sandy León challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Andrés Giménez steals (7) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. grounds into a double play, shortstop Jorge Mateo to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Nathan Lukes out at 2nd. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jesús Sánchez pops out to third baseman Austin Riley.

notableEvents.label: Mauricio Dubón pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mauricio Dubón grounds out, second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
